description: Style combined with technology makes this fabulous footwear from puma. With a superior walking gait, these shoes also gel well with any kind of casual outfit. Make a fashion statement with puma funky sneakers. These hot purple, berry toned sneakers are perfect for use in all recreational Sports.Upper Leather upper for an everlasting sheen Textile lining for durability and soft feel Perforations on the sides to keep your feet fresh and dry all day Knit synthetic laces for snug Fit Arched footbed for ergonomic fit Midsole Ultra light with advanced moisture transfer technology EVA midsole for shock absorption and lightweight feel Outsole Carbon rubber outsole with round lugs below the toe counter for superior traction Rubber protruding lugs below the heel counter for shock absorption
